Package net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.util

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    CabinAdapterFactory
    The Adapter Factory for the model.
    CabinGenerator
    This class contains all constructors for the different elements of the cabin.
    CabinSwitch<T>
    The Switch for the model's inheritance hierarchy.
    CabinValidator
    The Validator for the model
    EMFModelLoader
    This class is used for loading the previously stored model.
    EMFModelStore
    This class is used to store data locally by using the EMF Persistence API.
    PassengerPropertyGenerator
    This class is used to generate the passenger properties for each passenger individually.
    POHelper  
    ProbabilityMachine
    This method returns a random value depending on the distribution probability of each value.
    Rotator
    This class is used to rotate an array or part of an array.
    SimulationResultLogger
    This class is used to handle passenger data and to analyze and export it.
